AC Charging

DC Fast Charging
Direct to battery · Station
⚡DC Charging: Bypasses OBC — charges battery directly. Specify required kW in Phase 2. Requires 3-phase supply and significant electrical infrastructure (transformer may be needed).

400V · Three
kW
pcs
A
No Solar System
☀️Solar integration active. Load balancing with Meter + CT required. The Saro charger will monitor PV output via RS485 and prioritise solar surplus charging — critical for Syria where grid is offline 50%+ of the day.
🇸🇾Syria Power Conditions: Grid offline minimum 50% daily. System must operate from solar inverter during outages. Load balancing is critical to prevent tripping main breaker when solar is the only source.
